The key information here pertains to the function of reciprocal clasp arms in dental prosthetics. Reciprocal clasp arms serve primarily to counteract unwanted movements of the denture upon insertion and removal, ensuring stability and preventing rocking motions due to forces acting along the abutment teeth's axes.
